title: You've Ruined Portal
description: Fixes a bug in ruined portal datafix (for 1.18.2-rc1)
body:
# You've Ruined Portal
Fixes a world corruption bug in ruined portal datafixer that can happen when upgrading to 1.18.2 (see https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-248814)

Apparently that bug will be fixed in 1.18.2-rc2. Good to know, this isn't necessary in that version then.
